required_tools: GitHub push/PR only after explicit safe gate
required_verification: baseline local verification plan before implementation
notes: Developer backend UI module entitlement, independent login configuration, true Host portal login, and developer system announcement lifecycle are covered by real Chrome. Announcements now cover create/edit/unpublish/republish/delete plus developer-only 403 API enforcement. Project department reimbursement review, finance category/recycle lifecycle, inventory alert removal, basic admin, WMS main chain, finance voucher/invoice/receipt/import/export/category/recycle, and labor personnel/attendance/salary/risk slices have real Chrome CRUD/upload/download/state-change evidence. Product Green remains Yellow until production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download coverage are complete.
phase_1_required_gates: Claude CLI worker audit or test evidence
browser smoke for module visibility when feasible
